execution_queue_item.primary_operator_action: Run the production-like VS2 integrated security rehearsal in a controlled namespace.
execution_queue_item.required_proof_package: RequestContext trace, PostgreSQL/RLS evidence, OPA decision logs, egress transcript, backup/restore evidence, and audit refs.
execution_queue_item.stop_or_reject_when: Any cross-namespace read, unexpected egress, missing audit ref, unredacted secret, or unverifiable restore appears.

command_plan.purpose: Refresh the current local VS2 proof inputs before H04 review without treating local proof as production-like acceptance.
Refresh the local VS2 scenario report that H04 reviewers compare against the production-like environment transcript.
Refresh the ConnectorHub CS-CH-036 dependency report that remains local fixture evidence until H04/H07 human proof exists.

local_baseline_preflight_bundle.operator_next_step: Run the command plan, collect production-like H04 evidence, and validate a dated human reviewer record; this bundle is only a local comparison input.

recommended_preflight_command_plan.purpose: Refresh the current local VS2 proof inputs before H04 review without treating local proof as production-like acceptance.
Refresh the local VS2 scenario report that H04 reviewers compare against the production-like environment transcript.
Refresh the ConnectorHub CS-CH-036 dependency report that remains local fixture evidence until H04/H07 human proof exists.

required_human_delta: Production-like topology identifier and trusted RequestContext transcript.
Scenario-specific PostgreSQL/RLS and OPA transcripts from the reviewed environment.
Network default-deny and governed-egress transcripts from the reviewed topology.
Backup/restore evidence and audit-integrity report from the reviewed environment.
Dated ACCEPT or REJECT decision with redacted evidence packet manifest.

local_baseline_review_inputs.boundary: These local reports are comparison inputs for the H04 reviewer. They do not prove production-like RequestContext, PostgreSQL/RLS, OPA, egress, backup/restore, or audit readiness.

redaction_guidance.operator_warning: Do not paste raw secrets, provider payloads, local file paths, private user data, or unredacted external transcripts into the reviewer record. Use redacted refs or public-safe summaries; validate-record will fail on detected sensitive markers.

senior_review_perspective_findings.accepted_value_shape: redacted finding summary per required senior-review perspective

sensitive_marker_policy.operator_action: Replace any matching material with a redacted evidence reference or public-safe summary before submitting the reviewer record.

proposed_record_template.template_rule: This blank template is operator-preparation data only. It is intentionally not structurally valid until a human reviewer fills every required field with redacted external evidence references, each senior review perspective finding, and every evidence packet manifest entry.

rehearsal_checklist: Confirm integrated topology has trusted RequestContext, PostgreSQL/RLS, OPA, network controls, and backup/restore path.
Run the corrected integrated security and tenancy scenario suite.
Collect backup, restore, audit integrity, and evidence manifest reports.
Record ACCEPT or REJECT with findings and release impact.

lifecycle_steps.action: Review each senior-review perspective and collect missing external evidence before judging the gate.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: Filled senior_review_perspective_findings for every required role.

lifecycle_steps.action: Run the production-like VS2 integrated security rehearsal in a controlled namespace.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: RequestContext trace, PostgreSQL/RLS evidence, OPA decision logs, egress transcript, backup/restore evidence, and audit refs.

lifecycle_steps.action: Run the minimum external rehearsal needed to satisfy this scenario's required human record.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: Every required field and evidence-packet manifest row is filled with redacted refs.

lifecycle_steps.action: Record issues, exceptions, or remediation needs instead of accepting a partial rehearsal.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: issues_or_exceptions plus reject/blocker notes when any stop condition appears.
Structural validation envelope remains HUMAN_REQUIRED and redacted.

lifecycle_steps.action: Store the completed reviewer record, validation envelope, and updated scenario result trail.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: Dated ACCEPT or REJECT reviewer record plus validation ref.

lifecycle_steps.action: Use the next selector to advance only after dependency unlock evidence exists.
lifecycle_steps.evidence_required: Structurally valid ACCEPT validation refs for all dependency gates.

required_evidence: Production-like topology description and trusted RequestContext proof.
Backup/restore, evidence manifest, and audit integrity reports.

senior_review_perspective_sequence.decision: Confirm connected-source release claims do not outrun tenant, policy, egress, and recovery evidence.
Verify Product, Archive, and Connector boundaries hold under real RequestContext and deployment topology.
Require scenario-specific DB, policy, network, backup, restore, and audit transcripts.
Treat generated VS2 reports as inputs and require direct report, transcript, and audit integrity review.
Reject if RLS, OPA, egress deny, secret custody, or audit integrity is simulated where production-like proof is required.
Keep this gate separate from local VS2 proof and from ConnectorHub fixture PASS claims.

scenario_delivery_unit_plan.stop_or_reject_when: Any cross-namespace read, unexpected egress, missing audit ref, unredacted secret, or unverifiable restore appears.
